name: Larry Cohen, OurRevolution.com
subject: Anti-Labor Secretary
body:
Workers deserve better than Andy Puzder as Labor Secretary. Add your name right now.
#
Sisters and Brothers,
The record of Andy Puzder, Donald Trump's pick for Labor Secretary, is so terrible when it comes to protecting the interests of U.S. workers, it's no wonder that some have referred to him as the Anti-Labor Secretary nominee.
Puzder is CEO of the company that owns Carl's Jr. and Hardee's; more than half of the chains' restaurants have been cited with wage and hour violations by the very department he would oversee. And that's not all -- a recent survey of Carl's Jr. and Hardee's employees found widespread reports of sexual harassment sustained on the job.
That's why Our Revolution members are joining with Sen. Bernie Sanders and Rep. Keith Ellison in sending a message to Capitol Hill: workers deserve better than Puzder.
[**Sign our petition calling on the U.S. Senate to reject Andy Puzder, Trump 's anti-worker nominee for Secretary of Labor. We'll deliver your message to Capitol Hill during our rally on Thursday.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a3c/43f17890/206ade5a/62004e2a/2394102743/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/reject-andy-puzder-as-labor-secretary?source=em170214-puzder-full")
Puzder has been a vocal critic of some of the most fundamental battles for workers' rights today including raising the minimum wage, paid sick leave, the expansion of overtime pay, and the Affordable Care Act.
The CEO of Carl's Jr. & Hardee's restaurants once described the employees at his chains as the "best of the worst" and says he wants to use automation robots instead of workers.
By confirming Andy Puzder, the U.S. Senate would endorsing Puzder's agenda of rolling back wages and workplace rights for employees. If you believe workers deserve a living wage and that big money has no place in politics, this is your chance to make your voice heard and impact the future of our labor system.
[**We need a Labor Secretary who will put the American people ahead of corporate profits. Sign our petition opposing Andy Puzder and we 'll deliver your message to Capitol Hill.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a3c/43f17890/206ade5a/62004e2a/2394102743/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/reject-andy-puzder-as-labor-secretary?source=em170214-puzder-full")
Thank you for standing with us, and with the millions of American workers that would be negatively impacted by Puzder's nomination.
In solidarity,
Larry Cohen
Board Chair
Our Revolution

name: Chris Van Hollen (via DSCC.org)
subject: what we know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Michael Flynn's resignation over his communication with Russia raises more questions than it answers, and we need to get to the bottom of it.
---
[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ecab/2b07114c/45a6b94f/736aaaf1/1951351417/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/demand-trump-investigation?source=PT-20170214-VanHollen-ProsHV")
Friend --

The last 24 hours have raised serious national security concerns -- and this is just the beginning.

Not only have we learned more about Michael Flynn's secret contacts with Russia, but we also learned that Donald Trump was aware his National Security Advisor was lying and he still chose not to act. At least, not until it became a PR problem.

This is a time to put country before politics. Nothing less than the national security of this country is at stake.

**[It's time for Republicans to stand aside and support a full investigation into the Trump team's ties to Russia. Will you join us in calling for an independent investigation?](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ecab/2b07114c/45a6b94f/736aaaf1/1951351417/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/demand-trump-investigation?source=PT-20170214-VanHollen-ProsHV")**

The truth is, Michael Flynn's resignation raises more questions than it answers.

Did this Trump loyalist really go rogue and reach out to the Russians to discuss U.S. sanctions without consulting his superiors?

Did Russia really believe General Flynn had full authority to speak for the Trump administration? Or was Moscow in contact with other Trump officials?

After the Justice Department warned the White House three weeks ago that Flynn could be compromised by a foreign power, how could other officials remain in the dark about Flynn's conversations with Russia?

**And most importantly, what did President Trump know and when did he know it?**

**[Friend, will you add your name to stand with Senate Democrats who are calling for an independent investigation into Trump's connections with Russia?](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ecab/2b07114c/45a6b94f/736aaaf1/1951351417/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/demand-trump-investigation?source=PT-20170214-VanHollen-ProsHV")**

At a minimum, this affair shows that the White House chain of command is alarmingly unprepared to guard our national security. But darker still, it raises the possibility that Flynn is a scapegoat who resigned to protect others who were fully aware of his actions.

In either case, the American people deserve immediate action to know.

**Will you add your name to stand with us?**

**[https://dscc.org/demand-trump-investigation](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ecab/2b07114c/45a6b94f/736aaaf1/1951351417/VEsC/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/demand-trump-investigation?source=PT-20170214-VanHollen-ProsHV")**

Thank you for standing up for our democracy,

Chris Van Hollen
DSCC Chair

name: My Faith Votes
subject: Dr. Ben Carson needs your prayers
body:
Please pray with us that he's confirmed by the Senate.

View this email in your browser

Dear Peter,

Dr. Ben Carson, your former
National Chairman of My Faith Votes, is just one step away from
becoming the Secretary of Housing and Urban Development (HUD).

The only thing that stands
between this new chapter in Dr. Carson's life is a full Senate
vote - and that's where we need your help.

The Senate's decision can come
any day now. So please join millions of faithful Americans and
PRAY for Dr. Carson today!

To witness how the Lord can
transform a struggling 14-year-old boy growing up impoverished in
the inner-city of Detroit… to one of the world's leading
pediatric neurosurgeons… and now to Secretary of Housing
and Urban Development for President Donald Trump… is to
witness the American dream coming to life before our eyes.

Dr. Carson's deep hope for our
nation's future is what motivated him to enter the political
arena. As a consistent champion for biblical values, he fights
for the…

· Protection of
religious freedom
· Protection of
the the dignity and sanctity of life
· Promotion of
strong families and marriages
· Promotion of
compassion and support for those in need

These same biblical values form
the very heart of My Faith Votes. And your prayerful partnership
is needed to help carry this faith-filled legacy into the highest
levels of political and cultural leadership.

As Dr. Carson says,

"This moment in history is
perhaps the most critical period in the history of the United
States. People of faith can make the difference. If anyone is
going to define the culture that we live in, and the direction of
our nation, it is us."

Dr. Carson has fought and will
continue to fight great opposition as he steps into this role, so
we want to fight on our knees for him. That's why we're reaching
out to you to prayerfully support Dr. Carson through this
critical time.

Will you rally behind Ben? POST a
PRAYER at My Faith Votes to share with Dr. Carson!

Your prayer, along with the
prayers of the My Faith Votes faithful, will be gathered and
presented to Dr. Carson as an enduring source of spiritual
encouragement and empowerment to press into our shared future of
faith.

Your faith matters now more than
ever. Post a Prayer for Dr. Carson today!

Sincerely,
My Faith Votes

name: Donna Brazile
subject: It's time to investigate Trump's ties to Russia (add your name)
body:
This is bigger than Watergate
---
**Congress must launch an independent investigation into Donald Trump's ties to Russia. Add your name if you agree.

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Investigate-Trump-and-Russia1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170215_db2_nd2&source=em_20170215_db2_nd2")**
Friend --

For the past four decades, Watergate was the standard which all other political scandals were judged by. From now on, they'll be measured up against Donald Trump's Russia scandal.

We now know that multiple senior Trump campaign officials were in constant contact with Russian intelligence throughout the presidential campaign, all while Russia was interfering in our election to help Trump win.

Donald Trump and Mike Pence have both claimed that their campaign was never communicating with Russia. We now know they lied.

**[This scandal is like a rotten onion -- each new layer we peel back, the stench gets ten times worse. Congress must launch an independent investigation into Trump's ties to Russia. If you agree, add your name.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Investigate-Trump-and-Russia1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+This+scandal+is+like+a+rotten+onion++eac&utm_campaign=em_20170215_db2_nd2&source=em_20170215_db2_nd2")**

When Donald Trump publicly asked the Russian government to hack the State Department and release Hillary Clinton's emails, his top aides were in contact with Russia.

And while the Russian government was engaged in a cyber-espionage campaign against the Democratic Party, they were communicating with the Trump campaign.

Imagine what they might have been talking about.

**[These actions raise some serious and troubling questions about how Donald Trump's campaign undermined our government and our national security. The only way to answer them is with an independent, transparent investigation into Donald Trump's involvement in this Russian attack on our democracy.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Investigate-Trump-and-Russia1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+These+actions+raise+some+serious+and+tro&utm_campaign=em_20170215_db2_nd2&source=em_20170215_db2_nd2")**

This shouldn't be a partisan issue. But sadly, Republicans are engaged in their most galling act of political cowardice yet.

When more than a thousand Utahns went to Rep. Jason Chaffetz's town hall meeting and asked their congressman to exercise his oversight authority over Trump, Chaffetz dismissed them as paid protestors.

The chairman of the House Intelligence Committee, who was also a member of Trump's transition team while some of these conversations with Russian intelligence were happening, announced that he would not investigate Michael Flynn's contact with Russia. But he will investigate how the information leaked that got Flynn caught.

Paul Ryan doesn't want an investigation because he doesn't want to "prejudge any of the circumstances surrounding this until we have all of the information." What is that word for gathering information, Mr. Speaker? Oh right, "investigate."

And Sen. Rand Paul came out and said what most of the GOP was already thinking: that it doesn't make sense for Republicans to investigate Republicans because it will distract them from their main legislative priorities, like repealing Obamacare, gutting Social Security and Medicare, and passing tax cuts for the wealthy.

The GOP cannot simply wave away what is already one of the biggest scandals in American history -- especially since we still don't know where it ends.

**Join the 103,170 supporters who have already demanded action, and call on Republicans in Congress to launch an independent investigation into Trump and Russia. The future of our democracy depends on it:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Investigate-Trump-and-Russia1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170215_db2_nd2&source=em_20170215_db2_nd2")**
Thank you,

Donna

Donna Brazile
Chair
Democratic National Committee

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Trump will not be questioned.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by PEM PAC | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Friends,
**"Our opponents, the media, and the whole world will soon see as we begin to take further actions, that the powers of the president to protect our country are very substantial and will not be questioned**.**"**
These are the words of senior White House advisor Stephen Miller, one of Donald Trump's closest aides.

You'd be forgiven for thinking they were the views of a political leader from some other country that doesn't have a system of checks and balances, an independent judiciary, or a free press.

One of the greatest honors I had during my time in office was serving on the House Intel Committee, where we ensured that our nation's intelligence efforts across the globe were fully funded and supported. It has been nothing short of horrifying to see our national security strengths start to crumble in just the three short weeks since Trump has taken office.

Consider the damage he and his team have already done to our foreign policy:
* Enacted an unconstitutional immigration ban that makes our country _less_ safe by generating more hatred abroad
* Defamed our intelligence agents and used the CIA headquarters as a political prop
* Invented a fake terrorist attack (the poor souls of the Bowling Green Massacre) to scare Americans into supporting anti-Muslim efforts
* Secretly contacted Russian authorities during the campaign while publicly praising Putin's leadership
* Engaged in potentially illegal post-election communications with Russia, causing the resignation of National Security Adviser Michael Flynn

And now possibly worst of all, a senior White House aide comes right out and says that Trump can do whatever he wants in the name of national security, and "will not be questioned."

Our men and women in uniform - and the countless more whose names are never recognized - deserve better than this. They deserve a functioning government not consumed by petty trivialities and unconstitutional bluster.

Normally I'd say it can't get any worse, but with this administration, I fear it's about to get a _lot_ worse before it gets better.

We're in this together. And we must stay vigilant.

\-- Patrick |

If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c6c2/4067b0a/2ccabf968/7e7abf1e/3509935726/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170215_dnc_v3s1&source=em_20170215_dnc_v3s1"). name: Leigh K. Warren, EMILY's List
subject: New project: Input needed >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7353/24c69fd9/f7451a45/18e1786e/1819049831/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFR214N_digital_email_20170215_MembershipBig_n-all&source=WQEFR214N_digital_email_20170215_MembershipBig_n-all")
---

Peter,

We're halfway through February, and we're already putting our plans in place for 2018.

We just launched a new campaign, Run to Win, to recruit and train more women to run for office than ever before and plug our five-million-strong community into their races. We want to expand our reach in state legislatures, get engaged with city council races, and find mayors who will be progressive beacons. And with over 500,000 elected offices in America, we've got plenty of races to pick from.

I'll be frank: We want to go big. But exactly how many women we can help depends on one thing and one thing only: what this community wants to do.

**[Want EMILY's List to keep fighting on all fronts? Donate $3 now to become an EMILY's List member to make sure we have the resources to help more women run than ever before.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7353/24c69fd9/f7451a45/18e1786f/1819049831/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170213_email_MembershipFeb?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Want+EMILYs+List+to+keep+fighting+on+all&utm_campaign=WQEFR214N_digital_email_20170215_MembershipBig_n-all&source=WQEFR214N_digital_email_20170215_MembershipBig_n-all")**

My top responsibility at EMILY's List is making sure our budget and goals match up.

I have to say, the outpouring of support we've seen since Election Day is unprecedented. It's already changed our goals and priorities for the cycle. Launching Run to Win would not have been possible without the thousands of people who've become recurring donors in the last few months and the tens of thousands more who've stepped up to donate for the first time or the fifth.

Now how big Run to Win grows is up to you, Peter. If you're not in, the number of women we can recruit and train is good, but not the most we could do. But if you're ready to put Republicans on defense across the country, then it's time to take action.

**Become an EMILY's List member before February Membership Week is over to take our fight for progress to new heights:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/February-Membership-Week](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7353/24c69fd9/f7451a45/18e17868/1819049831/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170213_email_MembershipFeb?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgFebruaryMembersh&utm_campaign=WQEFR214N_digital_email_20170215_MembershipBig_n-all&source=WQEFR214N_digital_email_20170215_MembershipBig_n-all")**

Thanks,

Leigh K. Warren
Chief Administrative Officer, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7353/24c69fd9/f7451a45/18e17869/1819049831/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170213_email_MembershipFeb?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFR214N_digital_email_20170215_MembershipBig_n-all&source=WQEFR214N_digital_email_20170215_MembershipBig_n-all")
